description:
Perform a survival analysis on the 'kennan.gdt' dataset located at ~/Documents/gretl_data/kennan.gdt. Estimate a Weibull duration model using 'duration' as the dependent variable and 'prod' as the regressor with a constant. Extract the coefficient for 'prod' and the scale parameter 'sigma' to determine if the hazard function is 'Increasing', 'Decreasing', or 'Constant'. Save the hansl script to ~/Documents/gretl_output/strike_analysis.inp and a report to ~/Documents/gretl_output/strike_report.txt using the format:
Prod_Coefficient: <value>
Sigma: <value>
Hazard_Shape: <Interpretation>

metadata.data_source: Kennan (1985), The duration of contract strikes in U.S. manufacturing
